dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: How many large corporations use MediConn Solutions for their employee wellness solutions?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: As of April 2025, MediConn Solutions provided employee wellness platforms to 15 large corporations across Canada.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: Did MediConn Solutions update their platform interface for users in 2023?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: Yes. A major user interface update in Q1 2023 added new dashboard features, improved navigation, and introduced dark mode for users with that visual preference.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: How many regions is MediConn Solutions planning to launch new services in 2026?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: MediConn Solutions is planning teams for four new provincial markets in 2026 with launch dates yet to be finalized.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: What pharmacy partnerships did MediConn Solutions announce in May 2023?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: By May 2023, 16 pharmacy chains were integrated into MediConn Solutions' prescription delivery network to improve accessibility to clients all over the country.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: What was the most common technical support issue reported by our clients in Q4 2024?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: The top issue for MediConn Solutions clients in Q4 2024 was initial login failures following a security upgrade, which support teams were reportedly able to resolve within 8 hours of the lodgment of the support ticket.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: How did the MediConn Solutions Sales team handle customer data for new patients as per Canadian privacy law in Q1, 2023?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: As of Q1 2023, MediConn solutions updated its compliance protocols for new patient data, including annual ISO 27001 audits and stricter data validation procedures in line with Canadian PHIPA regulations.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: How did MediConn Solution use sales analytics to increase SME client retention in virtual health care services in 2023?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: In 2023, MediConn Solutions segmented SME client data by engagement tier and initiated targeted outreach campaigns. Clients receiving personalized support showed a documented 15% increase in account retention over six months, per CRM analytics.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: What did MediConn Solutions do in 2022 to handle customer support for new patient complaints and queries?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: MediConn Solution introduced a dedicated response team and automated ticketing system in early 2022, reducing the average resolution time of tickets to under 48 hours.
